collectives.allgather_launcher.detail: Host launcher + high-level op are available.

collectives.allreduce_launcher.detail: Host launcher exists, but benchmark/prod validation is not fully closed.

collectives.reduce_scatter_launcher.detail: Single-process reference reduce_scatter path is validated; the explicit device override is intentionally rejected for this mode until proven correct.

gemm_allscatter.full/full.detail: Stable public contract for full RHS and full output buffers.

gemm_allscatter.full/shard.detail: High-level wrapper materializes a heap-backed full output, then returns the rank-local shard.

gemm_allscatter.shard/full.detail: Public wrapper for assembling a full output from shard inputs is not implemented yet.

reduce_scatter.device.detail: Single-process device override is intentionally rejected because it is not yet correct.

symmetric_heap_allocator_first_import_ma.detail: Allocator-first canonical import/map layer is not implemented yet.

allgather.detail: High-level plan API is wired; requires an attached symmetric heap.

gemm_allscatter.detail: High-level plan API is wired via build_gemm_allscatter_plan(...).

gemm_reducescatter.detail: Public high-level API is still a placeholder; no stable fused contract yet.

reduce_scatter.detail: Single-process reference reduce_scatter path is validated; the explicit device override is intentionally rejected for this mode until proven correct.
